listitem.para: imA and imB are 2D matrices of the same size.
Correlation coefficient, a scalar of class double.

refsection.title: Description
refsection.para: imcorr2 computes correlation coefficient of two 2D matrices imA and imB. c = sum( (imA-mA).*(imB-mB) / sqrt(sum((imA-mA).^2) * sum((imB-mB).^2)) mA=immean2(imA) and mB=immean2(imB)

refsection.title: Examples

simplelist.member: Tan Chin Luh. Modified from the original work of Shiqi Yu

tr.td: IPC V-style public name introduced in development Step 3.
